title: Out of Time Festival
hero.title: Out of Time Festival
hero.subtitle: Where every beat stands still and the music never ends
band1.name: The Neon Beats
band1.desc: Formed in 2015, The Neon Beats electrified the underground scene with pulsating synth-rock and breathtaking live energy.
band2.name: Blue Harmony
band2.desc: Blue Harmony emerged in 2010, blending soulful pop and smooth jazz into irresistible festival anthems.
band3.name: Golden Echo
band3.desc: Golden Echo, established in 2005, keeps classic vibes alive with modern flair and timeless crowd‑pleasers.
genres.title: Genres - GrooveFest
genre1.name: Rock
genre1.desc: Get ready to rock the boat! With guitars blazing and drums hammering, rock music at GrooveFest hits all the right notes. From headbanging riffs to soulful solos, it's a feast for your ears that’ll leave you on cloud nine.
genre2.name: Pop
genre2.desc: Pop music is the cherry on top of our festival sundae. Catchy hooks and toe-tapping beats will have you dancing like nobody’s watching. Don't be surprised if you end up singing in the rain!
genre3.name: Oldies
genre3.desc: Golden hits from yesteryears that never get old! Our oldies lineup is like a blast from the past, perfect for reliving memories and making new ones. A true time-travel experience—music with a heart of gold.
contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.text: Questions, suggestions, or joining info? We’d love to hear from you!
contact.name: John Doe
